gt_sql: SELECT T2.OwnerUserId, T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.CreationDate) = '2010' ORDER BY T2.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.OwnerUserId, u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2010'
ORDER BY p.FavoriteCount DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which is the most valuable post in 2010? Please give its id and the owner's display name.
